name: Hithesh M N
title: Senior Frontend Developer | Angular Specialist | Full Stack Developer
summary: Angular specialist with 8+ years of experience building complex real-time trading platforms — from WebSocket data pipelines and TradingView integrations to copy trading engines and cross-platform mobile apps. Started as a UI developer across logistics and AI/ML platforms, now architecting full-scale trading systems, leading product delivery, and owning backend features end to end. Currently building and maintaining a live crypto trading platform used by Australian users — delivering across Angular, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS. Full-stack capable and comfortable owning features from UI to backend to deployment.

experience.project: Coin Centric / Crypto Centric — Crypto Trading Platform
bullets: Independently planned and executed a phased Angular 6 to 12 migration across 20+ modules and screens — upgrading Angular Material, resolving third-party dependency conflicts, and modernising architecture through lazy loading, modular restructuring, and reusable component design.

Architected and built a second Angular 14 application from scratch — defining application structure, shared service layer, reusable component framework, and responsive UI to deliver a scalable, maintainable platform.

Implemented the platform's real-time charting infrastructure by integrating TradingView Charting Library — resolving live data feed synchronisation challenges and building WebSocket-driven market data pipelines for cryptocurrency trading.
Built a custom HTML5 Canvas crypto bubble visualisation from scratch — implementing RxJS-driven real-time market data updates and dynamic bubble sizing algorithms for an interactive market overview.

Designed a real-time market trend analytics module combining custom sentiment-analysis logic, RxJS-based data orchestration, OnPush change detection optimisation, and Highcharts visualisations to deliver actionable trading insights.
Owned the Copy Trading module end to end — designing shared service architecture, reactive data flows, trade configuration management, and business-rule validations for automated trading execution.

Designed and implemented a full-stack crypto alerting system — enabling users to configure price and percentage-based alerts, with backend processing logic to evaluate trigger conditions and dispatch automated email and SMS notifications.
Built backend services for limit-order processing using Puppeteer to retrieve live NSE pricing, generating broker-ready trading orders based on real-time market data.

Re-engineered the futures trading execution engine following major IIFL API changes — preserving custom order-generation logic for price calculation, quantity distribution, and single-leg, double-leg, and four-leg trading orders.

Independently architecting a cross-platform Ionic trading application — delivering market monitoring, trading workflows, portfolio tracking, and backend API integration as sole frontend developer. (Currently in active development.)
Mentored junior developers through code reviews and architecture discussions alongside hands-on feature delivery across all three products.

experience.project: DCPS — CRM Platform & Math Initiative — E-Learning Platform
experience.context: DCPS: June 2023 – June 2024 · Math Initiative: October 2022 – June 2023
bullets: Architected and delivered DCPS — an internal CRM and workforce management platform for HR, recruitment, and sales teams — and Math Initiative, an EdTech platform for structured mathematical learning; both built from scratch.
Designed Angular 14 frontend architecture for both platforms — defining modular folder structure, shared service layers, reusable component frameworks, and development standards.
Implemented role-based access control (RBAC) and permission-driven workflows in DCPS, managing secure access across recruiters, managers, sales, and leadership with role-specific data visibility.
Built RxJS-based state management to track complex application state — recruitment workflows in DCPS and learner progress, quiz attempts, and course completion in Math Initiative.
Applied frontend caching and data optimisation strategies to improve rendering performance and reduce redundant API calls across data-intensive modules.
Built reusable Angular component libraries and shared modules used across both platforms, reducing duplication and accelerating feature delivery.

experience.project: Eagle Eye Cloud — AI/ML & Computer Vision Platform
bullets: Built complex UI components using HTML5 Canvas to render spatial data, object positions, and coordinate-based visualisations for computer vision model outputs — enabling clients to visually interpret AI detection and tracking results in real time.
Developed responsive, reusable Angular components for an enterprise AI and computer vision platform serving multiple clients across different industries.
Built interactive analytics dashboards and data visualisation modules using Plotly.js, allowing client teams to monitor model performance and analyse prediction results.
Worked closely with backend engineers and data scientists to align frontend data contracts, API response handling, and UI behaviour with application outputs.
Contributed to UX design, wireframing, and prototyping using Adobe XD; built reusable UI component libraries that reduced development effort across client-specific deliverables.
Developed customer-facing modules for a live logistics platform (movemygoods.in) using AngularJS, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap — responsible for responsive layouts, UI bug fixes, and homepage redesign.
Built a CERT vulnerability automation tool using Docker and Jenkins that automated security vulnerability reporting for the Nokia Security Management team.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio — Micro Frontend Architecture
bullets: Built a personal portfolio using a micro frontend architecture — hosting Angular as the shell application with React embedded as a remote module, demonstrating cross-framework integration using Webpack Module Federation.
Implemented smooth scroll interactions and motion design using Lenis to deliver a high-quality, interactive user experience.

projects.title: DuoBudget — AI-Powered Couples Budget Tracker
bullets: Designed and built a budget management application for couples to track shared expenses, split costs, and manage financial goals together.
Integrated an AI financial assistant powered by OpenAI to analyse spending patterns and provide personalised budget suggestions and financial guidance.

projects.title: Interactive 3D Business Website (In Development)
bullets: Building a highly interactive website with immersive scroll-driven animations and motion design using Angular and Lenis.

education.institution: Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, Bengaluru
